# Global engagement on a trusted, conversational channel

Unlock the power of WhatsApp with Iterable’s native integration. Drive real-time engagement, global reach, and secure communication—while streamlining workflows and creating seamless, personalized journeys across all your channels.

### Unlock Smarter Personalization with All Your Data

The best personalization starts where your data lives. With Iterable’s native WhatsApp integration, you can use all of your customer data—not just a limited subset—to deliver hyper-relevant messages that feel timely and personal. Easily weave WhatsApp into cross-channel journeys to power moments-based marketing that connects across the entire lifecycle.

**Perfect for:** Personalizing messages with real-time data, unifying customer insights, and creating seamless cross-channel experiences that drive engagement—all within a simple no-code interface.

### Engage globally with real-time, rich messaging on WhatsApp

Connect with customers around the world with rich, personalized content on a secure and reliable mobile messaging channel. With over 90% open rates and quick replies and CTAs to streamline conversations, WhatsApp helps brands create interactive connections at scale.

**Perfect for:** Reaching global audiences, having engaging conversations with rich media, CTAs, and quick replies and building trust through a policy-backed communication channel.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/WhatsApp_04.png)

### Work Faster with Native WhatsApp

Save time and stay in flow by managing WhatsApp campaigns directly within Iterable. Our native integration lets you plan, launch, and optimize without jumping between tools—so you can move faster, stay focused, and get more done.

**Perfect for:** Driving efficiency, maintaining full control of your messaging strategy, and accelerating execution with a single, connected platform.

### Create confidently with built-in guidance and smart alerts

Design and deploy WhatsApp campaigns with ease using Iterable’s intuitive tools. Built-in guidance and real-time alerts help streamline workflows, prevent errors, and keep your strategy optimized every step of the way.

**Perfect for:** Navigating the nuances of the WhatsApp Business Messaging Policy, simplifying template and campaign creation, and reducing manual mistakes.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/WhatsApp_05.png)

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/WhatsApp_06.png)

### Strategic WhatsApp support and services

As a benefit of Iterable WhatsApp, we work with you to define and implement your various WhatsApp use cases and help you get started fast. Iterable experts will provide personalized plans and hands-on guidance around WhatsApp setup, user strategy, omni-channel orchestration, and international rollout.

**Perfect for:** Seamless onboarding support, helping to build your brand’s WhatsApp playbook and translate it into executable cross-channel campaigns and journeys.

### Drive measurable ROI

Track performance clearly and measure success with detailed metrics like read receipts, conversions, and revenue. Optimize strategy holistically by attributing WhatsApp results across your marketing ecosystem for a 360° cross-channel view.

**Perfect for:** Consolidating your strategy to improve your ROI and eliminating guesswork to refine your WhatsApp strategy based on real-time campaign performance to make data-driven decisions.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/WhatsApp_07.png)

## Under the Hood

**Native to Iterable**  
Native business onboarding + template creation and management

**Supports Multiple WhatsApp Categories**  
Marketing, Utility, and Service

**Quick Reply Conversations**  
“Tap not type” predefined user responses create interactivity

**CTA Buttons**  
Like “call phone” and “visit website” for intuitive actions

**Built-In Guidance**  
Full observability into business and template quality to make decisions for a successful campaign setup

**Easy Personalization**  
Leverage platform capabilities like handlebars, merge parameters, data feeds, and short links

**Read Receipts**  
Know if your customers have seen your message

**Campaign Building**  
Build blast or triggered campaigns to reach users

**Journey Building**  
Create journeys with WhatsApp send tile, start tile

**WhatsApp API**  
Option to send campaigns via API

**Send Rich Content and Media**  
Images, emojis and rich text

**Share WhatsApp Events**  
Snowflake secure data sharing for WhatsApp events

**Events System Webhooks**  
WhatsApp events system webhooks to log data into CDP or BI systems

**Easy Content Creation**  
Compatibility with Copy Assist and image uploader
